item.description: Other post PSA PSA If you have facebook installed on your iPhone, Meta has been caught analyzing your camera roll with AI without your knowledge, here's how to disable it https://imgur.com/gallery/dygn6rT -------- Elon post hence did not make it viral despite lot of upvotes Investigative journalist Sönke Iwersen gives an insight into the inner-workings of Elon Musk’s Tesla. https://imgur.com/gallery/v8V1chD

item.dc:creator: cshin9

item.title: White people shit theme
item.description:
I am white... like white- white. Very white. Ghost white. Basic white bitch white. Can I talk to the manager white. I find this shit funny and like poking fun at "my people". Laugh with me.
I love asking them to explain what they mean when they make racist comments or make some sort of implication. Yeah, uncle Bob. I know what you WANT me to ASSUME but nah.
Guilty
I got invited to a gender reveal recently for some black friends. I looked at my husband and said "I thought that was something only white ppl do!" Then, we were the only white folks there. Just thought it was funny.
Every male relative of mine.
Guilty
My husband's friends call him the "light skinned-ed brotha" and has permission to use the "n-word". It hilarious. He's literally the only white guy in his 2 friend groups.
It's a jeep thing.
My son got suspended from school (8 years ago) for pointing out a black kids shirt was the same color as his skin. Admin said it was racist and all I could think of was this same scenario as this meme. It always gets a double take. It's not racist.
I found WAY too many of these ENTIRELY accurate. Hope you enjoyed!
item.dc:creator: justyouraveragepeacock

item.dc:creator: Johje19

item.title: hey media lab. this ones for you
item.description: and also for the old imgur owners who decided to sell them selves to such a notoriously shit company. context: imgur was sold by the owners to medialab, a notoriously bad company that also owns kik, worldstar, and the song matching app genius among other things. Medialab axed the rest of the old employees of imgur recently. the imgur we knew is officially dead and done. Medialab has a history of trying to get out of paying the full price it agrees to in contracts. how imgur couldnt see this shit happening is beyond me.

item.title: "I'm going to stop him. He is going to school to kill my friends"
item.description: Aitzaz Hassan, 11 years ago, aged 15, north-western Pakistan. I haven't seen this posted in a while. We need some reminders of selfless bravery. https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/world-asia-25663992

item.dc:creator: JKBenton

item.title: Robert correct again
item.description: The six largest health insurers reported more than $1 trillion in revenue and more than $31 billion in net income last year — and are now pushing to raise Americans’ premiums by as much as 66 percent for some policies, according to recent state regulatory filings. Those increases come as insurers dole out billions on stock buybacks and dividends that help drive up CEO compensation and line the pockets of investors.
item.dc:creator: IliveINyourHEADrentFREE
